titleStmt.title: SII 36.273: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 273. (A.R. No. 273 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: The ūr of Paḍuvūr in Paḍuvūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Āmūrk-kōṭṭam received a gift of 16(1/8) kaḻañcus of gold from Dēvanārayanan alias Tisaimāṇikkach Cheṭṭi, a merchant of Kadarpārpaḷḷi in Malai-nāḍu for feeding brāhmaṇas in the temple of Tiruviḍavandai, a dēvadāṉa of Paḍuvūr-nāḍu. It also agreed to measure out 25 kalams of paddy to the sabhā. The sabhā agreed to feed 12 brāhmaṇas daily for 30 days commencing from Sankrānti during the month of Kumbha (February-March). Mentions a grain measure equivalent to the grain measure of Kōmaḷam (kōmaḷattu nārācakkāl), an important mercantile centre (Kōvaḷam) situated close by.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyu(m)n=tanakkeyurimai pūṇṭamai manakko
ḷa kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅka pāṭiyum nuḷampa pāṭiyum taṭikaivaḻiyu
m kuṭamalai nāṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum Āḻkaṭallīḻamum tiṇṭiṟalvenṟi taṇṭāṟ ko
ṇṭa tanneḻil vaḷarūḻiyellāviyāṇṭum toḻutakai viḷaṅkumyiyāṇṭe ceḻiyarai te
cukoḷ śrī kovirājakecarivanmarkku yiyāṇṭu pattonpatāvatu Āmūrk koṭṭattup paṭuvūr nāṭ
ṭup paṭuvūr Ūrom kaiyyeḻuttu malai nāṭṭuk kaṭaṟpāṟpaḷḷi tevanārāyaṇanākiya ticaimā
ṇikkac ceṭṭi pakkal koṇṭa pon patinaṟu kaḻañcey Araikkāl Ippon kācu kallāl tu
ḷainiṟai pon patinaṟu kaḻañcey Araikkālum koṇṭa paricāvatu Innāṭṭut teva tānan=tiruvi
ṭavantai śrī koyilile vaiyttu brāhmaṇarai Ūṭṭuvatāka Ipponnukku palicaikkummāka
c cantirātittavaṟ vāṭākkaṭan komaḷattu nārācakkāloṭokkum marakkālāl Āṇṭu varai tai
yyiṭaivvarattil Aḷakkakkaṭava nellu Irupattaiṅ kalamum tiruviṭavantai sabhaiyār
pakkal śrī koyilil tirumuṟṟattile patamum pataru nīkki Aḷantu taravu koḷvommānom cuṭṭa
ppaṭṭa nellu Irupattaiṅkalamum Aḷavommākil Innellu Iraṭṭi muṭṭinavāṇṭaikkum
Aḷappomānom paṭuvūr nāṭṭup paṭuvūrrom Aḷavomākil tanmāsana mutalākat tāṉ veṇṭu
kovukku nicatam nālekāṟ kāṇan=taṇṭappaṭuvommānom Ittaṇṭappaṭṭum In nel
lum muṭṭāmeaḷappomānom Innelluk kaikkoṇṭu tiruviṭavantai savaiyom kumpa
nāyaṟu paṟṟina caṅkirān=ti mutaletir muppatu nāḷum nicatam panniraṇṭu brāmmaṇarkku nicatam Oru
vanukku Arici nāḻimuḻakkāka Arici Irupattoru nāḻi Ariciyum neykku nellu Aṟu nāḻi nellukku
Uḻakke Iru cevuṭarai neykkum kaṟikku nellu Aññāḻiyum morukku nellu Aññāḻiyum Uppu
kku nellu yuriyum viṟakiṭuvar Oruvanukku nicatam nellu Irunāḻiyum Aṭuvān Oru bramaṇanukku
nellu nānāḻiyum kalamiṭuṅ kucavanukku nellu munnāḻiyum veṟṟilaikkum pākkukkum nel
lu Irunāḻiyum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellu Iru tūṇippatakkāka Innellu Irupattaiṅ kalamum kai
kkoṇṭu nicatam panniraṇṭu brāmmaṇarai Āṇṭuvarai kumpa nāyaṟu muppatu nāḷum cantrātittavaṟ Ū
ṭṭuvommānom tiruviṭavantai sabhaiyom Ūṭṭomākil tanmāsanam mutalākat tān ve
ṇṭu kovukku nicatam nālekāṟ kāṇam taṇṭap paṭuvomānom taṇṭappaṭṭum muṭṭinatu muṭṭiraṭ
ṭiraṭṭiyum Ūṭṭuvommānom tiruviṭavantai savaiyom Ittanmam śrī vayiṣṇava rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 36.273 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
